content:
Hi all,

I've just published this on GitHub: https://github.com/nfdi4health/metadata-schema-utils

It contains a script we have been using for a while, for converting existing JSON Schema files into TSV files that can be loaded into Dataverse.

Perhaps this is interesting to somebody :) Best regards, Vera

Very interesting! Example JSON Schema files can be found at https://github.com/nfdi4health/metadata-schema-utils/tree/2ceea5b1e752b3d92f38d8fe26845079acd8422f/json_schema_to_dataverse_tsv/tests/assets , right?
Yes that's right :thumbs_up:
There's some related conversation over at #docs > POJO metadata block modeling
